svg.text: Steve Griffing, PE(CSE), CISSP-ISSEP, CPP · CC BY 4.0 · 2026
Mount SENSORHAT-1 on CF bulkhead at 65mm from nose
Stack CARRIER-2 on M2.5 nylon standoffs 6mm
Stack COMPHAT-SWITCH on CARRIER-2 40-pin GPIO header
Verify DF40C-100 CM4 connectors fully seated
Install OS microSD in CARRIER-2 slot
Install log microSD in COMPHAT-SWITCH slot
Verify JP2 forensic jumper installed · LED1 = GREEN
Mount each on M2.5 nylon standoffs 6mm
Secure stacks with M2.5 screw + nylon zip tie to keel
Connect each node Ethernet to COMPHAT-SWITCH (ports 1-4)
CAN FD: Starboard keel · chain N1-IN → N1-OUT → N2-IN → ...
Termination: N1 CLOSE · N2-N3 OPEN · N4 CLOSE
RS-485: Port keel · chain N1 → N2 → N3 → N4
Termination: N1 CLOSE · N2-N3 OPEN · N4 CLOSE
1553B: Dorsal spine · N1=BC · N2=RT01 · N3=RT02 · N4=RT03
SM-1553-11 xfmr handles impedance — no external 75ohm term
Ethernet: 6-pin JST-GH star from COMPHAT-SWITCH to each node
Verify all 4 Ethernet LEDs on Murex switch GREEN
SSH each CM4 · verify hostnames serenity-node-1 through 4
Check CAN bus: all 4 nodes sending HEARTBEAT
Check 1553: BC polls RT01/RT02/RT03 at 1ms frame
Check RS-485: mavlink-router shows 4 MAVLink sources
CG: balance hull at 152mm · slide battery rail as needed
Hull: Peter Farell CC BY 4.0 · Nozzle: BamJr CC BY 4.0 · Visual: Firefly/Serenity © Joss Whedon/Mutant Enemy/Universal — Fan engineering work
